title: Text Input
description: A text input lets users enter a single line of text. Includes label, optional helper text, character counter, and icon slots.
whenToUse: Single-line text entry: names, emails, search queries. When you need validation feedback (error state).
whenNotToUse: For multi-line entry, use a textarea. For choosing from a predefined set, use a dropdown.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Always pair with a visible <label>. Use placeholder for hints, never as a label replacement. Error messages should be announced via aria-describedby.
